{{Infobox character
| name = Lemon
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| abilities = immune to Subspace madness
| affiliations = Advocates
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

''See also: [[Lemon Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Lemon is a pale, bald human woman characterized by a bright yellow tattoo of a lemon cross-section on her skull. She is associated with the Advocates, wearing a specialized suit featuring yellow accents and an 'L' insignia. A person of significant power, she possesses abilities that allow her to produce an acidic substance resembling lemon juice; this liquid can act as a tide against defenders, erode shields, and create minefields in space. Despite being vastly outnumbered during combat, she remains defiant and expresses a strong desire to rebuild the Advocates. She is currently in a relationship with [[Omega]], often traveling with him and staying within subspace pockets during transit. While she is described as a source of constant surprises, her presence can also serve as a distraction.}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Lemon]] is a pale, bald, human woman with a yellow lemon cross-section tattoo on her skull.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c17">''The Engineer'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Lemon]] is in a relationship.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Lemon]] is an individual mentioned by [[Omega]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c41">''The Engineer'', chapter 41</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Lemon]] is a short human woman with a lemon tattoo on her bald head.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c23">''The Knight'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Lemon]] is working to rebuild the Advocates.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c23" />}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Lemon]] is a woman who has many stories from her [[life]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c36">''The Pilot'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Lemon]] was cursed by the [[Aether]] to live an interesting [[life]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c36" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Lemon]]'s brain was reinforced by an [[Aethril Progenitor]] to be immune to [[Subspace madness]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c36" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Lemon]] is a reincarnated star-[[dragon]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c36" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“We will rebuild the Advocates, stronger than ever.”<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c23" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
